series_metadata.series_description: Records for dangerous drugs/controlled substances showing drug name, strength, dosage form, quantity, expiration date and lot no., issued to/by, date and signature for receipt, and administration documentation which includes patient names.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 3 years after the date the last dosage was administered, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 3 years after the date the last dosage was administered, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
